item.description: President Xi Jinping opened the bilateral talks with President Trump by emphasizing that a stable bilateral relationship benefits the world and stating, “We should be partners, not rivals.”

media:content.media:title: ‘We should be partners, not rivals’: Chinese President Xi Jinping opens bilateral talks
media:content.media:description: President Xi Jinping opened the bilateral talks with President Trump by emphasizing that a stable bilateral relationship benefits the world and stating, “We should be partners, not rivals.”

item.title: ‘We should be partners, not rivals’: Chinese President Xi Jinping opens bilateral talks

item.description: The one child policy has left a lasting impact on Chinese society, where marriage and birth rates are both very low. That’s why the Chinese government is now instituting programs to encourage people to have children and get married. NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer has the story.

media:content.media:title: Inside China’s push for more marriages and children
media:content.media:description: The one child policy has left a lasting impact on Chinese society, where marriage and birth rates are both very low. That’s why the Chinese government is now instituting programs to encourage people to have children and get married. NBC News’ Janis Mackey Frayer has the story.

item.title: Inside China’s push for more marriages and children

item.dc:creator: David Ingram
item.description: Elon Musk traveled to China with President Donald Trump, despite the trial over his lawsuit with OpenAI and a judge’s order that he remain ready to be recalled.

media:content.media:text: Elon Musk v. OpenAI Trial Continues In California
media:content.media:description: Elon Musk arrives at federal court in Oakland, Calif., on April 30.

item.title: A judge told Musk he wasn’t excused from trial. He went to China with Trump anyway.

item.description: President Donald Trump makes opening remarks celebrating the U.S.-China relationship as bilateral talks begin.

media:content.media:title: Trump to Xi: Trade will be 'totally reciprocal'
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump makes opening remarks celebrating the U.S.-China relationship as bilateral talks begin.

item.title: Trump to Xi: Trade will be 'totally reciprocal'

item.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping shake hands, participating in a ceremony at the Great Hall of the People ahead of their bilateral talks.

media:content.media:title: Trump and Xi shake hands ahead of bilateral talks
media:content.media:description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping shake hands, participating in a ceremony at the Great Hall of the People ahead of their bilateral talks.

item.title: Trump and Xi shake hands ahead of bilateral talks

item.description: Children outside of the Great Hall of the People in Beijing greet President Trump ahead of bilateral talks with Chinese President Xi.

media:content.media:title: Children greet President Trump in Beijing
media:content.media:description: Children outside of the Great Hall of the People in Beijing greet President Trump ahead of bilateral talks with Chinese President Xi.

item.title: Children greet President Trump in Beijing

item.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi participate in an elaborate arrival ceremony ahead of their bilateral talks.

media:content.media:title: Honor guard welcomes Trump elaborate arrival ceremony
media:content.media:description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi participate in an elaborate arrival ceremony ahead of their bilateral talks.

item.title: Honor guard welcomes Trump elaborate arrival ceremony

item.description: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?

media:content.media:title: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?
media:content.media:description: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?

item.title: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?

item.description: Air Force One landed at Beijing Capital International Airport in China. Trump’s state visit includes a bilateral meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He is the first U.S. president to visit China since his last state visit in 2017 during his first term.

media:content.media:title: Trump arrives in China for Xi summit
media:content.media:description: Air Force One landed at Beijing Capital International Airport in China. Trump’s state visit includes a bilateral meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He is the first U.S. president to visit China since his last state visit in 2017 during his first term.

item.title: Trump arrives in China for Xi summit

item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping began the talks with President Donald Trump by emphasizing that the world is watching and is “at a new crossroads.”

media:content.media:title: U.S. and China 'should be partners, not rivals,' Xi says
media:content.media:description: Chinese President Xi Jinping began the talks with President Donald Trump by emphasizing that the world is watching and is “at a new crossroads.”

item.title: U.S. and China 'should be partners, not rivals,' Xi says

item.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi meet at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer explains the significance of the meeting place and welcoming ceremony.

media:content.media:title: Trump and Xi meet at the Great Hall of the People
media:content.media:description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi meet at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer explains the significance of the meeting place and welcoming ceremony.

item.title: Trump and Xi meet at the Great Hall of the People

item.description: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

media:content.media:title: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China
media:content.media:description: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

item.title: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

item.description: In a unanimous ruling, the South Carolina Supreme Court found former court clerk Becky Hill improperly influenced jurors during the trial. Prosecutors say they plan to retry the case. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

media:content.media:title: Alex Murdaugh’s convictions for murder of wife and son overturned
media:content.media:description: In a unanimous ruling, the South Carolina Supreme Court found former court clerk Becky Hill improperly influenced jurors during the trial. Prosecutors say they plan to retry the case. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

item.title: Alex Murdaugh’s convictions for murder of wife and son overturned

item.dc:creator: Adam Edelman
item.description: After a series of court rulings gave Republicans a decisive advantage in the national redistricting fight, Democrats’ options for a counterpunch before this year’s midterms are limited.

media:content.media:text: Trump Says Tennessee To Redraw District Maps To Boost GOP
media:content.media:description: Democrats are looking ahead to the next election cycle to respond to new Republican-drawn congressional maps in states like Tennessee.

item.title: Democrats turn to state legislative races to catch up in the redistricting battle

item.dc:creator: Alexandra Marquez
item.description: Political organizer Denise Powell has won the Democratic nomination in Nebraska’s 2nd District, NBC News projects, emerging from a tough primary fight in one of her party’s top opportunities to flip a swing seat this year

media:content.media:text: Denise Powell stands inside of a room smiling with her arms cross
media:content.media:description: Denise Powell advances to a general election matchup against Omaha City Council member Brinker Harding, who ran unopposed for the Republican nomination.

media:content.media:text: Nebraska Democratic State Senator John Cavanaugh
media:content.media:description: Denise Powell advances to a general election matchup against Omaha City Council member Brinker Harding, who ran unopposed for the Republican nomination.

item.title: Denise Powell wins Democratic primary for top House battleground district in Nebraska

item.description: The Utah mother who wrote a book about grief following her husband's death before being charged with his murder was sentenced to life without parole. Richins’ sentencing comes two months after she was found guilty of aggravated murder, attempted aggravated murder, fraud, and forgery in the March 4, 2022, death of Eric Richins.

media:content.media:title: Utah mom sentenced to life without parole for husband's murder
media:content.media:description: The Utah mother who wrote a book about grief following her husband's death before being charged with his murder was sentenced to life without parole. Richins’ sentencing comes two months after she was found guilty of aggravated murder, attempted aggravated murder, fraud, and forgery in the March 4, 2022, death of Eric Richins.

item.title: Utah mom sentenced to life without parole for husband's murder

item.description: Vice president JD Vance announced that the Trump administration will be deferring $1.3 billion in Medicaid reimbursements to the state of California. Vance also said the administration will be sending letters to states to aggressively pursue Medicaid fraud or risk losing funds.

media:content.media:title: Vance says Trump administration is withholding $1.3 billion in Medicaid payments to California
media:content.media:description: Vice president JD Vance announced that the Trump administration will be deferring $1.3 billion in Medicaid reimbursements to the state of California. Vance also said the administration will be sending letters to states to aggressively pursue Medicaid fraud or risk losing funds.

item.title: Vance says Trump administration is withholding $1.3 billion in Medicaid payments to California
